rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §21.4556 governs a civics training advisory board composition and operations. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.4556. CIVICS TRAINING PROGRAM ADVISORY BOARD.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and civics training advisory board statute.
